note: camt.053 bank statement reconciliation: balance equation, BkTxCd classification, structured-remittance match rate. ISO20022-BKTXCD-2023-03.

vectors.name: clean_statement_100pct_match
vectors.description: Clean 2-transaction statement: OPBD=10000 + CRDT 2000 - DBIT 1500 = CLBD 10500, both structured, CLEAN.

output_payload.table_source: ISO 20022 ExternalBankTransactionCode1Code registry 2023-03 release; CGI-MP camt.053 Usage Guide v5.0 2023
output_payload.regulatory_basis: ISO 20022 camt.053 BkTxCd Domain/Family/SubFamily classification per ExternalBankTransactionCode1Code registry 2023-03; balance equation OPBD + Σ movements = CLBD per CGI-MP camt.053 Usage Guide v5.0. Use for automated corporate TMS reconciliation. NOT for reconcile_mpp_subscription (MPP settlement) or reconcile_emir_pairing (EMIR trade reports).
output_payload.pii_note: ZERO PII: structural statement fields, amounts, and transaction codes only. No account holder, beneficiary, or personal data enters this kernel.
output_payload.not_legal_advice: Not accounting, tax, or legal advice. Reconciliation output requires review by qualified finance staff before use in financial statements.

vectors.name: failed_balance_equation
vectors.description: Balance equation fails: OPBD 5000 + CRDT 1000 = 6000 but CLBD reported as 5999, variance -1, FAILED_BALANCE.

output_payload.table_source: ISO 20022 ExternalBankTransactionCode1Code registry 2023-03 release; CGI-MP camt.053 Usage Guide v5.0 2023

vectors.name: partial_match_rate_70pct
vectors.description: 10-transaction statement with 7 structured / 3 unstructured → 70% match rate, balance passes, PARTIAL_MATCH.
